text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Awww... Even as plushies,<n>Umamusume are the
most precious of<n>flowers. They aren't to be taken
lightly.
choice_data_list: Sorry... I didn't have what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's okay! You didn't do anything<n>wrong!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've already abandoned my worldly<n>desires for
things such as cuddling<n>and petting, but I suppose
I still have<n>a ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to build more good karma and<n>purify myself
further to become a<n>simp worthy of a Cutie!
